meta.description: Portfolio of Leandro Costa, a full stack web developer based in Japan, building modern web applications, APIs, automation, and financial market tools.

skills.title: Skills
skills.headline: Full Stack Developer focused on complete solutions
skills.description: I work as a full stack developer building end-to-end products across frontend and backend, with experience in React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, and MQL5. Financial markets are part of my personal interests and hobbies, especially in projects involving MetaTrader and TradingView, and I am always studying new technologies to keep improving how I build reliable, modern, and well-structured solutions.
highlights: Modern frontend with React, Next.js, Tailwind, and the TypeScript ecosystem
Backends, APIs, automation, and real-time integrations with Node.js, Python, MQL5, MetaTrader, and TradingView
Projects that connect technology and financial markets with a focus on performance, testing, and reliability

projects.title: Projects
projects.headline: Solutions that connect interface, backend, and automation
projects.description: A few project examples that reflect how I like to build: polished experiences, organized APIs, and integrations designed to solve real problems.

items.title: Yui-Ki
items.description: Web platform for creating personalized digital invitations and experiences, with multilingual content, online payments, and automated communication.

items.title: FX Strategies
items.description: Windows-focused desktop dashboard for multi-timeframe market analysis, combining MetaTrader 5 data, Python indicators, local persistence, and a React interface with dark and light themes.

blog.title: Articles and technical notes
